Author: Crystal Job Rank contributors
Name: Crystal Job Rank
Punchline: Post-match CC stats and a separate rating for every job.
Description: Records Crystalline Conflict result screens and calculates a transparent Casual-and-Ranked rating for each job. Use /cjr or /cjr reset <JOB|all>.
Changelog: Casual and Ranked matches now share the per-job rating and opt-in leaderboard; Custom and Unknown-queue matches remain local and unrated. Includes the recalibrated rating model and history-preserving /cjr reset <JOB|all> commands.
